commit_message: docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-434

drift_observations.detail: POL-440 (mass seed-instructions re-scaffold) overwrote an existing, accurate POLARIS.md with an empty draft template, destroying real content describing this folder's promotion workflow and file inventory. Restored the prior accurate content and re-applied the current Generated Region Convention markers.

POL-440 overwrote the `12-archive.ts` bullet description and the entire 'Architecture assumptions' section (3 substantive lines on archive timing/telemetry sourcing/artifact-policy promotion) with empty placeholder comments. Restored the prior content.

POL-440 re-ran seed-instructions over 7 already-populated POLARIS.md files and replaced per-file behavioral descriptions (e.g. 'Rust graph adapter implementation') with a generic '<file> — <route> (<domain>)' placeholder, and in 2 cases (tracker/linear, tracker/local-file) coarsened the Route field from the specific subfolder to the parent 'src/tracker'. Restored the prior per-file descriptions and Route specificity in all 7 files.

These folders received real, functional code changes this cluster (ReconcilePacket support in skill-packet; canon-check.ts and validate-instructions.ts additions in smartdocs-engine) but their POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md were still empty seed-instructions drafts. Filled in Purpose, What belongs here, Editing rules, Architecture assumptions, and Related routes from direct source inspection; promoted (removed polaris:draft marker, kept the Generated Region markers per smartdocs-summary-architecture.md section 9).

POL-440 scaffolded draft POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md across ~65 other folders (branding/, test/**, most src/** leaves) that were not otherwise touched by this cluster's code changes. These remain accurate-but-empty drafts (no data loss found on inspection — verified via numstat sweep of POL-440's diff). Out of scope for this closeout session since no functional change occurred in those folders this cluster; recommend a follow-up ingestion/enrichment pass (or a seed-instructions fix so re-seeding never clobbers non-empty content) to populate or explicitly triage them.

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Filled empty seed-instructions draft with real content; promoted from draft.
Added 2 bullets documenting the new validate-instructions CLI command and canon-check drift classification (2 net new lines, within 50-line budget).

blockers.description: ~65 draft POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md files scaffolded by POL-440 across folders not otherwise touched by this cluster remain unpopulated seed-instructions drafts. No data loss found there, but they carry no real operational content yet.
blockers.recommendation: File a follow-up docs-ingest/enrichment cluster to run the adopt-canon 'canon' phase (enrichCanonFiles) over the remaining draft folders, or route them through operator review for manual authoring.

blockers.description: seed-instructions.ts / adopt-canon.ts re-scaffolding (as exercised by POL-440) overwrites existing non-empty POLARIS.md content with generic placeholders instead of preserving it, causing the two high-severity and one medium-severity drift observations recorded above.
blockers.recommendation: Consider filing a bug against seed-instructions.ts: re-seeding an existing POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md should preserve prior human/generated descriptions (or refuse to touch non-draft-marked files) rather than regenerating generic placeholder text over real content.

evidence_summary: Reconciled cognition for POL-434 (adopt-canon / smartdocs-engine canon-check, seed-instructions, validate-instructions / skill-packet reconcile-packet work, children POL-435-440). Filled in real content for two folders (src/skill-packet, src/smartdocs-engine) that got functional code changes but only had empty seed-instructions drafts. Discovered and repaired a regression: POL-440's mass re-scaffold run overwrote already-accurate POLARIS.md content in 9 folders (smartdocs/specs/raw, src/finalize/steps, and 7 graph/tracker adapter folders), destroying real prose in 2 cases and degrading per-file descriptions in 7 more; all restored from pre-POL-440 git history. Verified no other modified POLARIS.md files in POL-440's diff lost real content (numstat sweep). No cognition notes, Medic charts, or smartdocs/raw candidates were tied to this cluster's work, so no ingestion/promotion or cognition archival was needed. Link validation on all touched files passed (8/8). Left ~65 other POL-440-scaffolded draft folders untouched since this cluster made no functional changes there; flagged as a follow-up enrichment recommendation and filed a tooling-bug recommendation against seed-instructions.ts for clobbering non-draft content on re-seed. Status is 'partial' to surface these two non-blocking recommendations to the operator; the commit itself succeeded with no unresolved blockers to the reconciliation work performed.
